zh: 孩子一到三歲特別愛說話、
en: Children aged one to three especially love to talk,

zh: 一切對象都是有生命的、
太陽、月亮、動物、寵物也好、
en: the sun, the moon, animals, pets —

zh: 都是他們樂於交談的對象、
同時他們也最愛玩各種象徵性的遊戲、
en: They also love to play all kinds of symbolic games,

zh: 他們會學習媽媽洗菜、煮飯、
en: they imitate mom washing vegetables and cooking.

zh: 所以每種的遊戲都有孩子自命的意義、
en: Every game carries its own meaning the child has given,
and this is a truly fascinating stage.
